{{Quote|I know from personal experience that Fenald was capable of working for another at the same time he was my head of security. Loyalty, as I found out, was a negotiable item with him; he double-crossed me when members of some of the other ruling families conspired to take over Kuat Drive Yards.|Kuat of Kuat|<ref name="Hard Merchandise">''[[Hard Merchandise]]''</ref>}}
'''Fenald''' was the [[Chief/Legends|chief]] of [[security]] for [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] and, in particular, a lackey to the [[Kuat of Kuat/Legends|Kuat of Kuat]]. Fenald secretly plotted with [[Kodir of Kuhlvult]] to take control of a [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]] during the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Kodir betrayed him, however, by slitting his throat when he requested payment.
